questions.question: Scarcity in economics means
questions.explanation: Resources are limited relative to wants.

questions.question: Opportunity cost is
questions.explanation: Opportunity cost is the next best forgone option.

questions.question: Inflation is
questions.explanation: Inflation is sustained rise in price level.

questions.question: GDP measures
options: total value of goods and services produced

questions.question: Demand curve slopes
questions.explanation: Law of demand: quantity demanded falls as price rises.

questions.question: Shortage occurs when
questions.explanation: Shortage when quantity demanded exceeds quantity supplied.

questions.question: Elasticity measures
questions.explanation: Elasticity is responsiveness to price/income changes.

questions.question: Microeconomics focuses on
questions.explanation: Micro looks at individual consumers and firms.
